marketplace.title: Startup Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discover, vote and accelerate the most promising startups
marketplace.bookmarksDesc: Save startups to easily find them later.
marketplace.loginRequiredDesc: Sign in to access the marketplace

hero.description: Master Design Thinking, Lean Canvas, Growth Hacking and sustainable Business Models. Join the Tunisian startup ecosystem.

formations.title: Develop your entrepreneurial skills
formations.description: Comprehensive courses based on the best methodologies to create and grow your startup.
formations.startupMontageDesc: Elite masterclass: From idea to launch. Effectuation, Design Thinking, Lean Startup, Business Model and Growth Hacking combined.
formations.designThinkingDesc: Human-centered approach to solving complex problems creatively.
formations.leanCanvasDesc: The Running Lean method to turn your idea into success.
formations.growthHackingDesc: Strategies and tactics to accelerate your startup's growth.
formations.disciplinedDesc: 15 MIT Tactics to go from idea to execution.
formations.aiBusinessDesc: Artificial intelligence applied to business. Strategies, tools and case studies by Abdelrahman Sleem.
formations.keySummaryDesignThinking: Understand user needs|Rapidly prototype solutions|Iterate through feedback|5 phases: Empathy, Define, Ideate, Prototype, Test|Creative problem-solving|Cross-disciplinary collaboration
formations.keySummaryLeanCanvas: Business model on one page|Identify problem and solution|Key metrics and competitive advantage|Cost structure and revenue streams|Customer segments and channels|Rapid business model iteration
formations.keySummaryGrowthHacking: Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Revenue, Referral|Rapid data-driven experimentation|Traction channel optimization|Viral loops and referral marketing|Growth metrics and dashboards|Strategy scalability
formations.keySummaryAIBusiness: AI fundamentals for business|AI deployment strategies|Process automation and optimization|AI ethics and governance|Practical cases and AI ROI|Digital transformation through AI
formations.keySummaryDisciplined: 24 structured steps from idea to market|Market segmentation and selection|Value proposition quantification|User persona definition|TAM, SAM, SOM market sizing|Business model and pricing strategy
formations.keySummaryStartupMontage: From idea to launch in 6 modules|Effectuation and entrepreneurial logic|Design Thinking for startups|Lean Startup and rapid validation|Business Model Canvas and Lean Canvas|Growth Hacking and growth metrics

footer.description: Ignite Your Startup Journey. Training platform for entrepreneurs and startups. Develop your sustainable innovation skills.
footer.designedBy: Educational content designed and developed by
footer.expertTitle: University expert in entrepreneurship | Assistant Professor ISGIS Sfax | Co-founder Djagora Foundation

mvp.title: MVP Coaching & Validation
mvp.subtitle: AI-powered intelligent module for MVP tracking and validation. Adapted for universities, SSO and Startup Act.
mvp.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to start MVP validation.
mvp.name: Name
mvp.ideaPlusBM: I have an idea + validated BM

auth.resetSent: A reset email has been sent to
auth.emailNotConfirmedDesc: Check your inbox and click the confirmation link.
auth.accountExistsDesc: An account with this email already exists. Try logging in.
auth.accountCreatedDesc: A confirmation email has been sent. Check your inbox (and spam folder) to activate your account.
auth.emailSentDesc: Check your inbox to reset your password.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

formationsPage.heroDesc: STARTUNUP and external courses led by experts. Complete a course to access the Strategic Hub.
formationsPage.startunupDesc: Programs designed by the STARTUNUP Academy team.
formationsPage.externalDesc: Courses led by external trainers in your area of expertise.
formationsPage.externalRequiredDesc: for students, student-entrepreneurs and pre-seed startups wishing to access the Strategic Hub.
formationsPage.prerequisiteDesc: Complete a course with a score ≥ 70/100 to unlock access to the AI strategic orchestrator.
formationsPage.becomeTrainerDesc: Are you an expert in your field? Join our network of trainers and lead remote courses for tomorrow's entrepreneurs.
formationsPage.createDesc: Automatically generate a complete training application from your topic.
formationsPage.evaluationDesc: Space dedicated to trainers. Evaluate your participants and issue certificates.
formationsPage.platformStrategyDesc: Platform economics, network effects, monetization and ecosystems.
formationsPage.bmcVsLeanDesc: Expert comparative analysis. Understand the fundamental differences.
formationsPage.businessModelDesc: Sustainable economic patterns and models. BMC and green entrepreneurship.
formationsPage.marketingStartupsDesc: Positioning, PLG, Traction & Copywriting for startups.
formationsPage.cChiefDesc: Periodic table of C-Suite roles. Executive diagnostic.
formationsPage.aiBusinessDesc: Artificial intelligence applied to business. Strategies, tools and case studies.

startupMontage.skillsDesc: Key skills you will develop during this course.
startupMontage.programDesc: 6 progressive modules to master startup building.
startupMontage.readyDesc: Join this intensive course and learn the methodologies used by the world's most successful startups.

designThinking.foundationsDesc: Discover the basics of Design Thinking methodology: from empathy to iteration, through problem definition and prototyping.
designThinking.growthDesc: Apply Design Thinking to accelerate your business growth: innovation strategies, value creation and scaling.
designThinking.metricsDesc: Measure the impact of your innovation initiatives with the right metrics: North Star, OKRs, NPS, and growth indicators.
designThinking.toolsDesc: Explore the 48 essential Design Thinking tools, organized by methodology stage. Use search and filters to find the right tool for your situation.

leanCanvas.title: Running Lean & Scaling Lean
leanCanvas.desc: Ash Maurya's complete method to go from Plan A to a working plan, then master key growth indicators. 98 slides + 26 tools.
leanCanvas.ideaToFitDesc: Iterate quickly from your Plan A to a working plan, before exhausting your resources.
leanCanvas.masterGrowthDesc: Define traction, build your customer factory, and optimize systematically.
leanCanvas.scalingCalcDesc: Calculate your critical KPIs with benchmarks adapted to your business model: LTV/CAC, Runway, NRR, and more.
leanCanvas.toolsDesc: All canvases, frameworks and templates from Ash Maurya's Running Lean & Scaling Lean method. Click on a tool to see details and download the template.
leanCanvas.downloadableResourcesDesc: Official templates and canvases to put the Lean methodology into practice.

ecosystem.title: The Tunisian startup ecosystem
ecosystem.desc: Complete mapping of the Tunisian entrepreneurial ecosystem actors and Startup Act guide for innovative entrepreneurs.
ecosystem.periodicTableDesc: Discover all actors of the Tunisian startup ecosystem: incubators, accelerators, venture builders, fablabs and coworking spaces. Click on an element for details.
ecosystem.greenDesc: Discover green entrepreneurship actors in Tunisia: cleantech, agritech, circular economy startups, public structures and green financing.
ecosystem.startupsDesc: Discover the flagship startups of the Tunisian ecosystem, their success stories and growing sectors.
ecosystem.dynamicEcosystemDesc: Discover all actors of the Tunisian entrepreneurial ecosystem: incubators, accelerators, investors and partners.

green.title: Green entrepreneurship:
green.titleHighlight: the future of the Tunisian economy
green.desc: Discover sustainable business models that combine economic profitability, positive social impact and environmental preservation. Tunisia is positioning itself as a GreenTech hub in North Africa.
green.circularEconomyDesc: Eliminate waste by design and keep products in circulation.
green.solarEnergyDesc: Exceptional solar potential of Tunisia with 3000+ hours of sunshine/year.
green.waterMgmtDesc: Innovative solutions for water stress and water scarcity.
green.windEnergyDesc: Harnessing wind potential from coastal and inland areas.
green.globalMarket: Billions $ - Global green economy market by 2030

community.title: STARTUNUP Community
community.desc: Join our community of entrepreneurs, trainers and mentors.
community.howToAccess: How to access the Strategic Hub?
community.howToAccessDesc: Lead a remote training in your area of expertise to earn the STARTUNUP Badge (trainer name, date and topic). This badge unlocks access to the Strategic Hub.
community.forumDesc: General discussions and training space with scheduled trainings calendar, real-time chat.
community.strategicPoleDesc: Complete strategic console: AI Consultant, Business Intelligence, integrated MVP Validator, Invest Space and tools.
community.leanCanvasLabDesc: Methodical 6-phase protocol to test and validate your MVP with 25 Lean Canvas tools. Integrated specialized AI coach.
community.marketIntelligenceDesc: Y Combinator methodology: transform raw data into expert strategy. Hidden truths, investor stress-test.
community.investSpaceDesc: Advisory, coaching and investment decision-making service. AI Advisor, file preparation and MVP logic link.

strategic.title: Strategic
strategic.desc: 7 phases to transform your idea into a disruptive startup. International Business Plan & Pitch adapted to your ecosystem.
strategic.formationRequiredDesc: Minimum score of 70/100 required to access the Strategic Hub.
